PostgreSQL 14.13 (Ubuntu 14.13-1.pgdg20.04+1) on x86_64-pc-linux-gnu, compiled by gcc (Ubuntu 9.4.0-1ubuntu1~20.04.2) 9.4.0, 64-bit

parameters.subsql:
SELECT MAX(date) AS date,
       chat_id, 
 	   user_id,
	   new_chat_member_status
FROM telegram_member_updates
WHERE new_chat_member_status = 'left'
GROUP BY date, chat_id, user_id, new_chat_member_status
ORDER BY date

result_schema.title: geo
